references.title: An ontology engineering approach to the realization of theory-driven group formation
references.journal: International Journal of Computer-Supported Collaborative Learning

annotations.text: Team formation is one of the most important steps in successful collaborative learning activities. However, it is difficult for a multitude of reasons: talent, knowledge, interactions, etc… The main goal of the paper is to create a theory-driven framework to group formation.
Authors validate their approach on a sample of 20 students and four instructors.
